Lisa Frankenstein (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $9,774,285Details
International Box Office $153,429
Worldwide Box Office $9,927,714
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $418,245
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $663,227
Total $1,081,472
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A coming of RAGE story about a misunderstood teenager and her high school crush, who happens to be a handsome corpse. After a set of playfully horrific circumstances bring him back to life, the two embark on a murderous journey to find love, happiness… and a few missing body parts along the way.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,695,785 (37.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:98.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,144 opening theaters/3,144 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $10,336,023

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 9th, 2024 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: February 8th, 2024 (Wide) (Hungary)
February 9th, 2024 (Wide) (Finland)
February 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Germany)
February 23rd, 2024 (Wide) (Croatia)
March 1st, 2024 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: February 27th, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violent content, bloody images, sexual material, language, sexual assault, teen drinking and drug content.
(Rating bulletin 2812 (cert #54044), 12/6/2023)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Filming location (city or town): New Orleans, LA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Louisiana, United States
Plot point: Frankenstien's Monster, Romance
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: MXN Entertainment, Focus Features, Lollipop Woods
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
